pattern: Account verification request with urgent deadline
description: Email claims account will be suspended unless user verifies credentials immediately via provided link
examples: Your account will be suspended in 24 hours. Click here to verify.
Immediate action required: Confirm your identity to avoid account termination

pattern: Password reset notification not requested by user
description: Fake password reset email attempting to harvest credentials through malicious link
indicators: Urgency to act if you didn't request
examples: We received a request to reset your password. If this wasn't you, click here immediately.
Your password was changed. Click here to secure your account if this wasn't you.

pattern: Invoice or payment notification with attachment or link
description: Fake invoice claiming payment is due, directing to credential harvesting page
examples: Invoice #12345 is overdue. Pay now to avoid service interruption.
Your payment of $500 is pending. View invoice details here.

pattern: Delivery notification for package you didn't order
description: Fake shipping notification attempting to steal credentials or install malware
examples: Your package could not be delivered. Click here to reschedule.
Pay $1.99 delivery fee to receive your package.

pattern: Tech support scam claiming device is infected
description: Email claims computer is infected and directs to fake tech support
examples: Warning: Your computer has been infected with malware. Call immediately.
Microsoft Security Alert: Virus detected. Contact support now.

description: Fake bank notification about suspicious activity requiring verification
examples: Unusual activity detected on your account. Verify your identity immediately.
Your account has been limited. Log in to restore full access.

description: Claims recipient has won prize and needs to provide personal information to claim
examples: Congratulations! You've won $1,000,000. Reply with your details to claim.
You've been selected for our exclusive prize draw. Claim your reward now.

description: Fake notification about social media account requiring verification
examples: Your Facebook account will be disabled. Verify to keep your account.
Instagram security: Confirm your account or lose access permanently.
